rationale: Fresh validation passes for TASK-087 narrow dependency-direction guard slice. Accepted feedback, documentation, planning, and implementation builds form a traceable chain. Implementation build uses change_type=system, traceability.requires_accepted_build=true, and accepted_build_refs includes .codewiki/builds/planning/2026-05-16-planned-task-087-dependency-direction-guard-fixt.json. The slice adds regression fixture coverage proving source-owned file-structure audit detects forbidden domain-to-application and application-to-adapter imports. It satisfies the TASK-087 acceptance item for dependency checks/tests while leaving broader source migration open.
